records.question: Which users named Helen have reviewed the item titled avocado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE item.title = 'avocado' AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u_id
FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Helen' AND item.title = 'avocado'

records.question: Which users named Helen gave a rating of exactly 10 and a rank of at least 1 to the item titled orange?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rating = 10 AND useracct.name = 'Helen' AND item.title = 'orange' AND review.rank >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u_id
FROM useracct
WHERE name = 'Helen'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM review
    WHERE review.u_id = useracct.u_id
      AND rating = 10
      AND rank >= 1
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM item
        WHERE item.i_id = review.i_id
          AND title = 'orange'
      )
  )

records.question: Which user accounts have written reviews with a rank of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rank >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u_id
FROM review
WHERE rank >= 1

records.question: Which user accounts named Mark have reviews rated exactly 7 with a rank of at least 4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE review.rank >= 4 AND useracct.name = 'Mark' AND review.rating = 7

records.question: Which user accounts belong to Helen who have reviews with a rating of exactly 7 and a rank of exactly 3?
records.gold_sql:

records.question: Which user accounts have reviews with a rating of at most 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE review.rating <= 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT u_id FROM review WHERE rating <= 5

records.question: Which users named Helen have reviews with a rank of at least 5 and a rating of at most 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rank >= 5 AND review.rating <= 5 AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u_id
FROM useracct
WHERE name = 'Helen'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM review
    WHERE review.u_id = useracct.u_id
      AND review.rank >= 5
      AND review.rating <= 5
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM item
        WHERE item.i_id = review.i_id
      )
  )
